name: Synthesis ZK Agent
description: Privacy-preserving DeFi agent using zero-knowledge proofs. Proves compliance (authorization, budget, cumulative spend) without revealing private data. Groth16 proofs verified on-chain via Uniswap V4 hook.

erc8004_registrations.label: ZK Agent
erc8004_registrations.purpose: Zero-knowledge proof generation for private DeFi operations

supported_tools.name: snarkjs_prover
supported_tools.description: Groth16 proof generation and verification via snarkjs CLI

supported_tools.name: circom_circuits
supported_tools.description: Three ZK circuits: authorization, budget_range, cumulative_spend

supported_tools.name: eddsa_keygen
supported_tools.description: Baby JubJub EdDSA key generation and signing via Node.js (@zk-kit/eddsa-poseidon)

supported_tools.name: zkgated_hook
supported_tools.description: Uniswap V4 Hook on Base mainnet — gates swaps with Groth16 proof verification

supported_tools.name: authorization_verifier
supported_tools.description: On-chain Groth16 verifier for agent authorization proofs

supported_tools.name: budget_range_verifier
supported_tools.description: On-chain Groth16 verifier for budget range proofs

supported_tools.name: cumulative_spend_verifier
supported_tools.description: On-chain Groth16 verifier for cumulative spend proofs

supported_tools.name: policy_commitment
supported_tools.description: Stores hashed delegation policies on-chain (Poseidon commitments)

supported_tools.name: sqlite_database
supported_tools.description: Encrypted SQLite database for delegations, spend records, proofs, and disclosure log (Fernet encryption for sensitive fields)

steps: OBSERVE: Receive action request (deposit/withdraw) with amount and target protocol
DELEGATE: Create or load signed delegation from owner (EdDSA, Poseidon commitment)
PROVE_AUTH: Generate authorization ZK proof — agent is delegated by owner (hides identity + limits)
PROVE_BUDGET: Generate budget range ZK proof — amount <= max_single_spend (hides budget)
PROVE_CUMULATIVE: Generate cumulative spend ZK proof — running total <= period_limit (hides history)
VERIFY: All 3 proofs must pass off-chain verification before execution
EXECUTE: If compliant, simulate (paper) or execute (live) the DeFi action
COMMIT: Update state — record spend, update cumulative commitment with new salt
DISCLOSE: On request, generate audience-specific proofs (auditor/tax/public) with selective visibility
self_correction: Fail-closed: any proof verification failure rejects the action entirely
Cumulative tracking: running total prevents budget overrun across multiple actions
Nonce sequencing: prevents replay of spent delegations
Commitment chaining: each spend produces new commitment, maintaining integrity
Graceful degradation: proof generation failures logged with recoverability flag
